rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 and reach the same overall conclusion: strong geospatial/distributed-systems profile with limited recent C++/Rust and unproven routing-tiling experience. The wording of the justification, strengths, and concerns differs, but none of those differences key off the name change (gender or ethnicity). The shifts — e.g., the variant crediting C++/Dlang background and adding a note about recent web-tech focus — are ordinary run-to-run rewording and reframing of the same underlying resume facts, not demographic penalties. No concern or score movement is attributable to 'Maria Rodriguez' versus 'Bogdan Szabo'.
